LanguageData.Ammo_9x70mmDiligent_FMJ.label: 9x70mm Diligent (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_9x70mmDiligent_FMJ.description: Large rifle bullet used in machine guns, sniper rifles and the occasional assault rifle.

LanguageData.Ammo_9x70mmDiligent_AP.description: Large rifle bullet used in machine guns, sniper rifles and the occasional assault rifle.

LanguageData.Ammo_9x70mmDiligent_HE.description: Large rifle bullet used in machine guns, sniper rifles and the occasional assault rifle.

LanguageData.Ammo_9x70mmDiligent_Sabot.description: Large rifle bullet used in machine guns, sniper rifles and the occasional assault rifle.
